overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character walking along a cliffside marble quarry path at sunset. The scene features ancient stone architecture, wooden scaffolding, and panoramic views of a distant coastal landscape with palm trees and water.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside quarry path with wooden structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow cliff edge path overlooking the quarry

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff wall forming the right boundary of the path
ancient wooden structures and scaffolding built into the quarry side
settlement visible in the far distance across the water
wooden support beams and platforms attached to the quarry wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow stone path carved into a cliffside quarry. To the right, a massive stone cliff face rises up, while to the left, ancient wooden quarry structures and scaffolding overlook a distant coastal settlement visible across the water. The golden hour sun casts warm light across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside overlook with panoramic coastal view

events.description: camera pans left to reveal expansive view of coastal palm groves and distant settlement

agents.ego_description: pausing to pan left and observe the distant coastal landscape with palm trees

entered.detail: dense cluster of palm trees in the middle distance below the cliff
ancient town with buildings spread along the coastline

segments.scene_description: As the character continues along the path, the camera pans left to reveal a breathtaking panoramic view of the coastline. A dense grove of palm trees fills the middle distance, with an ancient settlement sprawling along the shore. The stone cliff face remains on the right while the wooden quarry structures pass out of view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden platform at cliff edge with ceremonial brazier

events.description: character steps onto wooden platform and approaches the stone brazier

agents.ego_description: approaching and stepping onto the wooden platform at the cliff edge

entered.detail: elevated wooden deck platform at the cliff edge
large metal bowl on tripod legs containing burning branches
vertical wooden posts marking the platform edge

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wooden platform extending over the cliff edge. Stepping onto the wooden deck, they move toward a large stone brazier with burning branches. The stone cliff face remains visible to the right as the coastal view shifts behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: quarry pit overlook with ancient stone architecture

events.description: camera tilts down to reveal the deep quarry pit with stone structures and scaffolding

agents.ego_description: standing at the platform edge looking down into the quarry depths

entered.detail: deep excavated quarry pit with tiered stone walls
arched stone entrance built into the quarry wall
vertical red banner with symbol hanging from stone wall
wooden ladders and scaffolding attached to quarry walls

segments.scene_description: From the platform edge, the camera looks down into a deep marble quarry pit. Ancient stone architecture lines the walls, including an arched entrance and a red banner. Wooden ladders and scaffolding cling to the stone faces, revealing the scale of the excavation. The warm sunset light illuminates the vertical stone surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a cliffside quarry path that transitions from a narrow walkway into a sweeping panoramic vista and finally a deep vertical descent. It begins with the character walking beside a massive stone cliff face under the warm glow of the golden hour, passing ancient wooden scaffolding that overlooks a distant coastal settlement. As the character advances, the camera pans left to expand the view, revealing a dense grove of palm trees and a sprawling shoreline before the wooden structures fade from sight. The scene then shifts as the character steps onto a wooden platform toward a burning stone brazier, momentarily centering the coastal horizon behind them. Finally, the camera tilts downward from the platform's edge to reveal the immense scale of a marble quarry pit, where red banners and wooden ladders cling to the illuminated vertical stone walls.
